news.title: 24 July 2024: When fear became routine
news.snippet: While victims continued to die from their injuries, security operations expanded, offices resumed under curfew restrictions, and the return of internet connectivity began to reveal the scale of the massacre

news.title: Khalilur seeks Singapore support for Asean, RCEP aspirations
news.snippet: Bangladesh has sought Singapore's support for its Asean and RCEP ambitions, while urging continued backing to resolve the Rohingya crisis.

news.title: Salman Shah murder: Probe report now deferred to 30 August
news.snippet: The other accused in the case are Samira’s mother Latifa Haque Lucy, businessman Aziz Mohammad Bhai, actor Don, David, Javed, Faruk, Ruby, A Sattar, Saju, and Rezvi Ahmed alias Farhad.

news.title: FM calls for stronger regional cooperation, sustainable solution to Rohingya crisis at Asean forum
news.snippet: Khalilur Rahman urges collective efforts to ensure the safe, voluntary and dignified repatriation of the Rohingya to Myanmar's Rakhine State.

news.title: Modi invites Tarique to Brics Summit in New Delhi
news.snippet: Dhaka says it expects peace and stability in the region and hopes India will address issues through democratic means.

news.title: Swapon stresses need for authority to determine journalist status
news.snippet: Minister urges inclusive, legally grounded decisions on press accreditation.

news.title: Govt plans to celebrate World Tourism Day with nationwide events
news.snippet: The celebrations will feature exhibitions, live cooking shows and other events across the country to promote Bangladesh’s tourism, culture and culinary heritage.

news.title: No villager should die for lack of treatment: Dr Zubaida
news.snippet: Bangladesh currently has only 0.83 physicians per 1,000 people, meaning one doctor often has to serve between 1,200 and 1,800 patients, with the situation being even worse in rural areas.

news.title: Child rape-murder suspect assaulted again at Sylhet court premises
news.snippet: The incident occurred around 10am when police brought 30-year-old Zakir Hossain from Sylhet Central Jail to the Sylhet Women and Children Repression Prevention Tribunal in a prison van.

news.title: UGC unveils draft five-year higher education reform plan
news.snippet: The draft strategy for 2026-2030 outlines priorities including improving graduate employability, strengthening university-industry links, advancing digital transformation and attracting international students.

news.title: EC awaits parliament reference before acting on expelled Jamaat MP
news.snippet: The election commissioner said the EC has not yet received any reference from Parliament in this regard.

news.title: Ctg NCP leader arrested in rape case over promise of marriage
news.snippet: The complainant, an HSC second-year student, alleged that the accused raped her after promising marriage and later cut off communication.

news.title: After years of neglect, rescued elephant Badsha Bahadur gets a second chance
news.snippet: After spending decades performing in circuses, his health deteriorated significantly due to age and prolonged neglect.

news.title: Govt extends passport issue, re-issue timeframe for expatriates till Dec 31
news.snippet: “This special privilege according to the new decision will be effective till December 31”, said a notification issued by the Ministry of Home Affairs on Tuesday (21 July).

news.title: Ex-JCD leader stabbed dead in Bogura
news.snippet: Police said Atiqur Rahman Sagor was fatally stabbed in an alleged attack by rivals in Bogura early Thursday and efforts are underway to arrest those involved.

news.title: Exim Bank ex-chairman Nazrul denied bail in Tk857 crore embezzlement case
news.snippet: Dhaka Metropolitan Senior Special Judge Md Shahjahan Kabir passed the order after hearing arguments from both sides, confirmed ACC lawyer Tarikul Islam.

news.title: Govt sends 17 senior police officials into compulsory retirement
news.snippet: The retired officials include DIGs, additional DIGs, a joint police commissioner and a police superintendent serving in various police units.

news.title: Mother, daughter among 3 British-Bangladeshis drown in UK beach
news.snippet: Family member said no decision has yet been made on whether the bodies will be brought back to Bangladesh for burial.

news.title: Measles: Death toll rises to 805 as 2 more children die in 24hrs
news.snippet: The number of suspected measles deaths has risen to 710, while laboratory-confirmed deaths now stand at 95.

news.title: Govt unaware of any decision by president to resign: Home minister
news.snippet: According to Salahuddin Ahmed, claims of President Mohammed Shahabuddin resigning are unconfirmed rumours without official verification.

news.title: TIB report on rising crime in capital does not match police data: DMP commissioner
news.snippet: He said police presence had been increased in crime-prone areas.

news.title: HSC exams under Ctg board to resume 27 July
news.snippet: Remaining examinations under the Chattogram Education Board, as well as Madrasah and Technical Education Boards in its jurisdiction, will continue as per the existing schedule, while postponed papers will be rescheduled later.

news.title: CPA seeks details of rain-damaged cargo after rejecting liability claims
news.snippet: The port on Tuesday (21 July) issued a notice asking C&F agents to submit details of import and export cargo damaged by the flooding at port yards.

news.title: PM invites global investors to partner in Bangladesh's economic transformation
news.snippet: The prime minister promises reforms to attract long-term investment and private sector growth.

news.title: Bangladesh achieves first ventilator-assisted brainstem glioma radiotherapy success
news.snippet: Delivering 30 radiotherapy sessions to a critically ill patient on mechanical ventilation marked a milestone for cancer care in Bangladesh.

news.title: Google Q2 revenue tops expectations as AI, ads drive strong growth
news.snippet: “Our AI investments are redefining what’s possible across every part of our business,” Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai said in a statement.

news.title: Pubali Bank to acquire Bengal Group's 26-storey Swiss Tower for Tk800cr
news.snippet: According to the bank, the property is located at 208, Tejgaon Gulshan Link Road. The transaction remains subject to approval from Bangladesh Bank and other relevant regulatory authorities.

news.title: Measles death toll crosses 800, experts blame vaccination gaps, weak response
news.snippet: Herd immunity not achieved as more than 40 lakh children remained unvaccinated.

news.title: UGC plans to connect overseas Bangladeshi academics with local universities
news.snippet: The initiative aims to bring Bangladeshi academics abroad and international scholars into teaching and research through a virtual platform as part of a wider digital transformation of higher education.

news.title: Fair Electronics to resume Samsung smartphone production in Bangladesh after 18-month hiatus
news.snippet: Samsung-branded refrigerators are already being produced at Fair Electronics' factory in Narsingdi, while washing machine production is set to begin in September.

news.title: How Bangladeshi expatriates joined the July Uprising from afar
news.snippet: As students bled and the internet was shut down in Bangladesh, expatriates around the world joined the movement in their own ways. Strangers worked together because they shared the same fear, anger and responsibility towards their homeland

news.title: Govt to launch nationwide door-to-door health screening: Health minister
news.snippet: The government will recruit 1 lakh health workers, 80% of them will be women.

news.title: Cabinet body clears Tk 7.34cr contract variation for RUET project
news.snippet: Construction costs rise as committee clears revised budget for RUET project.

news.title: Late-session sell-off drags DSEX as insurance margin row rattles investors
news.snippet: Margin lending debate and global tensions dent confidence on Dhaka bourse.

news.title: PM assures businesses of improving energy supply within a year
news.snippet: The prime minister told BGMEA leaders that government measures to address the energy crisis will become visible within one to one-and-a-half years.

news.title: Facebook, Messenger face outage, users report widespread disruptions
news.snippet: Users reported problems sending messages, refreshing feeds and loading content, while Meta had yet to comment on the disruption.

news.title: Jamuna Bank profit jumps 22% to Tk378cr in H1
news.snippet: During the first half, its consolidated earnings per share stood at Tk4.03, which was Tk3.31 a year ago.

news.title: Govt to launch 'National Health Card' to eliminate healthcare inequality: Faqir Mahbub
news.snippet: The proposed National Health Card will enable nationwide access to patients' medical records, helping improve healthcare access and reduce urban-rural disparities.

news.title: Shifting winds: Bangladesh in an age of fragmented interdependence
news.snippet: As great-power rivalry reshapes global politics, Bangladesh's greatest strategic advantage lies not in choosing sides but in building resilient institutions, diversifying partnerships and practising disciplined multi-alignment

news.title: bKash deploys largest Bangla QR network nationwide to accelerate cashless payment
news.snippet: From neighbourhood grocery stores to pharmacies, restaurants, hotels, supermarkets, lifestyle brands and leading retail chains, customers can now conveniently pay by scanning Bangla QR codes deployed by bKash.

news.title: Measles: Death toll reaches 803 as 6 more children die
news.snippet: Since 15 March, a total of 1,03,078 patients with suspected measles have been hospitalised nationwide, of whom 99,294 have recovered, according to DGHS.

news.title: Gold prices rise again in Bangladesh within 24 hours
news.snippet: Under the revised pricing, each bhori (11.664 grams) of 21-carat gold will now cost Tk 2,14,093, while 18-carat gold has been set at Tk 1,83,883 per bhori. Traditional gold will sell at Tk 1,50,232 per bhori, the notice said.

news.title: BB suspends assistant director over alleged fraud, crypto transactions, online betting

news.snippet: OpenAI said the breakout was "an unprecedented cyber incident, involving state-of-the-art cyber capabilities" and that the company ⁠was reinforcing its safeguards.

news.title: What Bangladesh's creative economy actually needs
news.snippet: A Tk3 billion budget allocation will achieve little if the government keeps building hubs while ignoring the tax burden, broken payment infrastructure, and a copyright law that hasn't been updated in two decades

news.title: Hydration break. For life.
news.snippet: Women in water-stressed parts of Bangladesh spend more than three hours a day collecting water. On the pitch in the 2026 World Cup, footballers are guaranteed a three-minute hydration break. The gap between those two facts is a policy failure — and t...

news.title: Healthy diet unaffordable for 38.6% Bangladeshis, South Asia’s second-highest: UN report
news.snippet: The report estimated that 38.6% of Bangladesh's population could not afford a healthy diet last year, compared with 63.0% in Pakistan.

news.title: Health experts stress quality maternal care to cut maternal deaths
news.snippet: The workshop focused on sexual and reproductive health and rights (SRHR), nutrition and the role of the media in raising public awareness.

news.title: Stocks rebound as DSEX jumps 41 points to edge near 5,900 mark
news.snippet: According to the daily market review by EBL Securities, the capital bourse maintained a firm upward trajectory from the opening bell.

news.title: Tk9,367cr provision gap: BSEC orders Dhaka exchange to ensure lenders' quarterly reporting
news.snippet: According to BSEC data, the total provisioning deficit against negative equity and unrealised losses stood at Tk9,367 crore as of May.

news.title: Teachers should educate students as their own children: Milon

news.title: Govt returns non-teaching staff recruitment power to MPO school, college governing bodies
news.snippet: The education ministry scrapped the deputy commissioner (DC)-led committee system and restored the previous recruitment process for non-teaching MPO posts.

news.title: JU temporarily expels 8 students over ragging allegations

news.title: Iran’s oil supply threat extends beyond Strait of Hormuz
news.snippet: Oil and gas producers in the Gulf are seeking alternatives to the Strait of Hormuz as traffic again comes under fire. But is Iran also turning its attention to the pipelines meant to bypass the waterway?

news.title: Do nations need investment summits at home and abroad?
news.snippet: Bangladesh's investment problem is no longer a lack of promotion but a lack of reform. Unless the country tackles regulatory uncertainty, corruption and the high cost of doing business, it will continue to lose investors to regional competitors

news.title: Bangladesh urgently needs bonds, not bank loans
news.snippet: As concessional financing declines, Bangladesh must build a deep bond market and expand Sukuk to mobilise domestic savings, reduce reliance on banks, and finance long-term developmen

news.title: Ctg HSC exams not resuming on 27 July, viral notice fake: Inter-education board panel
news.snippet: Social media posts on the matter are misleading, the panel says in an urgent clarification.

news.title: India approves its first dengue vaccine

news.title: Govt sets ambitious post-LDC targets as investment languishes
news.snippet: The targets are outlined in the Country Programme Document 2026-2031, prepared by the commerce ministry with financial support from the World Trade Organisation (WTO).

news.title: Why dollar rate is rising again
news.snippet: Several commercial banks purchased remittance dollars from exchange houses yesterday at Tk123.75 per dollar, about 10 paisa higher than in early July.

news.title: Large-cap support helps DSEX end flat as insurance stocks continue to bleed

news.title: DSHE directs all schools, colleges to form sports committees for PM's Gold Cup Football 2026
news.snippet: The committees will be responsible for overseeing preparations and related activities for the tournament.

news.title: The silent return of a killer: Bangladesh's measles crisis
news.snippet: Bangladesh once nearly eliminated measles. Now it faces one of its deadliest outbreaks in decades — 100,000+ cases, over 700 dead, mostly children too young to be vaccinated.

news.title: GDP growth slows to 2.22% in Q3 of FY26
news.snippet: The latest quarterly national accounts show broad-based weakness across the economy during the January-March period.
